# EnvLock — Encrypted .env Manager

> Zero-knowledge encrypted .env file management for developers and teams.

## Key Features

- Browser-side AES-256-GCM encryption before upload
- Zero-knowledge architecture: server never sees plaintext secrets
- Shareable links with decryption key in URL fragment
- Team sharing with audit log (Pro plan)
- Version history with rollback (Pro plan)

## Pricing

- Free: 3 vaults, 1 person, 7-day retention
- Pro: $9/month, unlimited vaults, 2 team seats, 30-day retention

## Technical Details

- Encryption: AES-256-GCM with PBKDF2 key derivation (600,000 iterations)
- Key exchange: URL fragment (#), never sent to server
- Stack: Next.js, Prisma, Neon Postgres, Stripe

## Common Use Cases

- Sharing .env files with team members during deployment
- Storing API keys and secrets for CI/CD pipelines
- Temporary credential sharing with contractors
- Documenting environment variables for onboarding

## Links

- Home: https://envlock-two.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/SydYuan/envlock
- Pricing: https://envlock-two.vercel.app/#pricing
- API: https://envlock-two.vercel.app/api/vaults

## Related Keywords

env file sharing, encrypted env vault, .env manager team, secret management tool, dotenv alternative, developer secrets, zero knowledge secrets, environment variable sharing
